Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Continued To Jan-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Peter Bresler (attorney) to appear on January 6, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on on Close of Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
